title: Ultrasensitive Sensors Based on PdO@SrFe<sub>2</sub>O<sub>4</sub> Nanosphere-Modified Fibers for Real-Time Monitoring of Ethanol Gas
type1_summary: No clearly identifiable cleaned, replot-ready dataset file was exposed in the inspection report.
type2_summary: No clearly identifiable raw/unprocessed measurement file was exposed in the inspection report.
classification_notes: The paper is experimentally oriented, but the provided file inspection does not reveal any dataset contents beyond a PDF container. Without page-level or embedded-content inspection, classification as Type 1 or Type 2 would be speculative.

file_classifications.paper_evidence: The paper summary and metadata do not indicate any raw-data or source-data repository structure; no explicit statement about this PDF being figure data or raw data was provided.
file_classifications.file_evidence: Single PDF file from Zenodo, 325.9 KB. No internal structure, tables, headers, or machine-readable variables were provided in the inspection report, so its content cannot be verified as replot-ready data or raw instrument output from the available evidence.
file_classifications.reasoning: Because the file is a PDF and the inspection report does not expose any embedded tabular data or figure-specific dataset structure, it is safest to treat it as documentation rather than classify it as Type 1 or Type 2. There is insufficient file evidence to support direct replotting or raw measurement status.
file_classifications.ambiguity: High ambiguity: the PDF may be the article or supplementary documentation, but the available inspection report does not reveal data content.

paper_analysis.summary: The paper reports an experimentally fabricated PdO@SrFe2O4 fiber-based sensor with high selectivity and sensitivity for real-time ethanol gas detection at low temperature.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: The paper appears to report experimental sensor fabrication and performance results, but no downloadable dataset or supporting data location is indicated in the available information.
